share一個網友經歷 :
又真係冇諗過

Balmorhea, Texas. Driving across the country with my girlfriend from NYC. Google maps takes us off the main road, but I zoom out to double check and it looks like a good shortcut to get where we’re going. The trail gets dustier, and suddenly we’re at an open gate through which the “road” keeps going. I check the map again, and it looks OK, so we enter through. I figure, if the gate is wide open, we’re probably safe. Passing a large barn, suddenly about 15 huge dogs come running after us. Real big dogs. Barking, angry dogs. We keep driving as per Google’s instructions but the “road” suddenly ends and there’s a creek that we could in no way cross to keep driving. So, we manage to turn around with these huge dogs surrounding us and slowly drive back the other way. Only when we get back to the gate this time, it’s closed. In our rear-view, we see a golf cart sputtering towards us. It’s an old lady. We roll down the window, not long before we hear “Y’all better get the hell out of here NOW!” We try to tell her we’re sorry and explain what happened, but she’s not hearing it. “If y’all hurt one of my dogs, I’m gon SHOOT YOU!” My girlfriend is freaking out, but the gate is closed, so the old lady pretty hilariously has to explain to us that it will open automatically if we approach it closer. “It’ll OPEN automatically if you just PULL UP!” So we drive up and it starts to open, but we’re too close to it, and awkwardly back up to let it open all the way before hightailing the F out of there. Never taking the “shortcut” in the middle of nowhere ever again.

I actually submitted a report to Google about this and never heard back from them.
此回覆已被刪除

replies.msg:
耀德政治犯收容所（朝鮮語：요덕 정치범수용소／耀德政治犯收容所 Yodŏk Jŏngchibŏm Suyongso */?）是北韓境內的政治集中營之一，位於咸鏡南道耀德郡。該集中營正式名稱為「15號管理所」（勞教中心），歸國家安全保衛部管理，關押的是「人民公敵」。耀德對囚犯的處罰相對其他北韓集中營較輕，主要懲罰囚犯進行強制勞動改造。

據美國國務院估計，該處關押的政治犯為數15至20萬人。

quote.msg:
Balmorhea, Texas. Driving across the country with my girlfriend from NYC. Google maps takes us off the main road, but I zoom out to double check and it looks like a good shortcut to get where we’re going. The trail gets dustier, and suddenly we’re at an open gate through which the “road” keeps going. I check the map again, and it looks OK, so we enter through. I figure, if the gate is wide open, we’re probably safe. Passing a large barn, suddenly about 15 huge dogs come running after us. Real big dogs. Barking, angry dogs. We keep driving as per Google’s instructions but the “road” suddenly ends and there’s a creek that we could in no way cross to keep driving. So, we manage to turn around with these huge dogs surrounding us and slowly drive back the other way. Only when we get back to the gate this time, it’s closed. In our rear-view, we see a golf cart sputtering towards us. It’s an old lady. We roll down the window, not long before we hear “Y’all better get the hell out of here NOW!” We try to tell her we’re sorry and explain what happened, but she’s not hearing it. “If y’all hurt one of my dogs, I’m gon SHOOT YOU!” My girlfriend is freaking out, but the gate is closed, so the old lady pretty hilariously has to explain to us that it will open automatically if we approach it closer. “It’ll OPEN automatically if you just PULL UP!” So we drive up and it starts to open, but we’re too close to it, and awkwardly back up to let it open all the way before hightailing the F out of there. Never taking the “shortcut” in the middle of nowhere ever again.

I actually submitted a report to Google about this and never heard back from them.
Texas 嘅老太婆係咪噉樣？

南冰洋某個小島
https://goo.gl/maps/R3TRjY5gwmP2
I had a great time enjoying my stay at the top of this mountain. The Polar Bear at the front desk was a little rude as it ate my son but eventually i was able to get my key to my room. The food consisted of penguins and it was delicious. Only other problem i had was the sever lack of people. I expected to come here seeing thousands of people. All i found was a bunch of dead people who suffered from frostbite or had polar bear bite marks on them. The Polar bear at the front desk said he had nothing to do with it. I believe him. 10/10 would recommend. How the hell do i even have internet here.

入面啲Google Reviews 先搞笑
Awesome place. I had an awesome experience with locals.
They greeted us with spears and arrows. One spear went dangerously close to my head.
It was a kind of Hide and seek. Then they bathe me in a huge cauldron.
I loved the way they cooked my hand.
Then they started there wild dance.

I returned with a spear in my head , an amputated leg and many other souvenirs.

留名

十字路口的怨靈

按下方Google Map街景連結，然後慢慢往北走，往北走，往北走⋯⋯

https://www.google.com/maps/@-27.5936496,-48.5511395,3a,49.2y,151.68h,97.91t/data=!3m6!1e1!3m4!1syEUZYDMrQdACNu19uCX_tQ!2e0!7i13312!8i6656

我們都知道Google Map街景會為了安全和私隱問題，而屏蔽某些特別事物，例如核電廠、軍事基地、車牌，但屏蔽了一整個街口又是什麼玩法？是電腦出錯？飛蟲入鏡？還是更恐怖的原因呢？

該街段位於巴西聖卡塔琳娜州佛羅安那波里市(Florianópolis)，拍攝時間在2013-2014年，但直到2015年初才有網民發現異狀。從Google Map街景所見，地點是一條普通商業住宅混合的街道，有一定人流和車輛經過，看似沒什麼異常。但當你沿著鈄路往下走，經過一所餐廳，來到十字路口時，你會發現四周繁華的街道景色驀然被黑暗吞噬，陷入漆黑一片。

來到這裡，我們仍然能說這只是Google車故障所以拍少了照片，但當你再回頭一望時，會看到在漆黑盡頭有一張模糊的綠色人臉和兩隻仿佛張開的手臂。這又是什麼鬼東西來呢？有網民把圖截下來再調光，顯示出來竟然似一隻人形怪物！有人說它是一隻穿長裙的女鬼，又有人說是一隻有雙凌厲蛇眼的蛇妖，正張開它的血盤大口，但無論如何怎樣看也不似尋常的圖片錯亂。

為什麼Google街道會有如此詭異的角落？我們都知道Google街道偶爾會拍得畸形的東西，那些都能歸納於拍攝錯誤，但全黑屏獨留一處鬼影又是什麼拍攝錯誤？很多網民也百思不得其解。如果不是拍攝錯誤，那又會是什麼呢？

利申 copy and paste

quote.msg:
題外話

入面啲Google Reviews 先搞笑
Awesome place. I had an awesome experience with locals.
They greeted us with spears and arrows. One spear went dangerously close to my head.
It was a kind of Hide and seek. Then they bathe me in a huge cauldron.
I loved the way they cooked my hand.
Then they started there wild dance.

I returned with a spear in my head , an amputated leg and many other souvenirs.

該街段位於巴西聖卡塔琳娜州佛羅安那波里市(Florianópolis)，拍攝時間在2013-2014年，但直到2015年初才有網民發現異狀。從Google Map街景所見，地點是一條普通商業住宅混合的街道，有一定人流和車輛經過，看似沒什麼異常。但當你沿著鈄路往下走，經過一所餐廳，來到十字路口時，你會發現四周繁華的街道景色驀然被黑暗吞噬，陷入漆黑一片。

來到這裡，我們仍然能說這只是Google車故障所以拍少了照片，但當你再回頭一望時，會看到在漆黑盡頭有一張模糊的綠色人臉和兩隻仿佛張開的手臂。這又是什麼鬼東西來呢？有網民把圖截下來再調光，顯示出來竟然似一隻人形怪物！有人說它是一隻穿長裙的女鬼，又有人說是一隻有雙凌厲蛇眼的蛇妖，正張開它的血盤大口，但無論如何怎樣看也不似尋常的圖片錯亂。

為什麼Google街道會有如此詭異的角落？我們都知道Google街道偶爾會拍得畸形的東西，那些都能歸納於拍攝錯誤，但全黑屏獨留一處鬼影又是什麼拍攝錯誤？很多網民也百思不得其解。如果不是拍攝錯誤，那又會是什麼呢？

之前係reddit有篇故就係主角好鍾意係google map用行人mode睇屋企附近嘅街景，之後發覺有人望住鏡頭舉手🙋🏻‍♂️say hi，主角放大之後之後發覺個人帶住面具，即刻好驚，同埋前幾日睇完呢條路，記得唔見有呢個人，無理由google咁快update。然後主角用行人mode繼續look，發覺每一頁都有同一個面具人say hi 因為google街景係用車去拍，個面具人無可能走得咁快...look下look下主角發覺已經look到返屋企，面具人企左係門口，今次無🙋🏻‍♂️，反而係望住主角屋企度門，然後主角就聽到敲門聲
